title: Hyphen protocol v0 envelope
description: One frame carries one envelope (docs/protocol/hyphen-protocol-v0.md §3). v0 is strict: unknown envelope fields are rejected; loosening is a deliberate pre-v1 decision, not an accident.

protocol.description: Protocol id + minor version; v0 receivers reject anything else with protocol/version-unsupported

sessionId.description: null only in hello; assigned by the responder

type.description: Message type, e.g. hello, ack, notification.dismiss.request

capability.description: Governing capability for plugin messages; absent on core types

seq.description: Per-sender, per-connection, monotonically increasing from 1; hello consumes seq 1

ackOf.description: messageId being acknowledged; only meaningful in ack

sentAtUnixMs.description: Sender wall clock; diagnostics only, never identity

payload.description: Type-specific body; per-type schemas are separate files

localOnly.description: Trace ids must not leave the device unless the user explicitly opted in (HYP-M2-014/HYP-M4-004)
